LOW.definition: Docs, planning, local metadata, reports, small templates, and narrow local checks.

MEDIUM.definition: Small UI/component changes, tests, and small local scripts.
MEDIUM.defaultRoute: Code X small bounded prompt or Copilot later

HIGH.definition: Architecture rewrite, build system changes, export/writer, payment, deploy, real sample/audio, or external APIs.

BLOCKED.definition: Production deploy, payment activation, real writer/export, proprietary content, whole repo scan, destructive git history rewrite, or unapproved external automation.
